scene.message: Snuff out the candle's flame?{nl} {ctl0e:0}{ret}
Snuff out the candle's flame?{nl} {ctl0e:0}{ret}
You stopped snuffing{nl} out the candle's flame.{waitkey}{ret}
The candle is not lit.{waitkey}{ret}
The candle is lit.{waitkey}{ret}
The door now opens freely.{waitkey}{ret}
Open the door?{nl} {ctl0e:0}{ret}
